zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏空，潜在回调压力
zh.content:
目前以太坊价格位于2227.17美元，短期涨幅有限，整体呈现震荡偏空格局。日内高低点为2228.64/2221.33，价格接近20日均线SMA(20)2259.29下方，显示多头动能受抑，短线反弹受阻明显。

MACD指标显示值为-13.95，处于零轴下方，表明空头趋势仍占主导，但缺乏信号线数据限制判断强弱。RSI未提供，但结合价格走势和均线位置，市场买入动能不足，存在调整风险，需关注后续动能变化。

支撑位方面，初步关注2220美元附近，若跌破可能进一步下探至2200美元附近。阻力位集中在2240-2255美元区间，突破该区间短期多头方可尝试回补。价格在均线下方运行，短线多空转换仍需谨慎操作。

交易策略建议以保守为主，可考虑低多高空策略。在2220-2225美元附近逢低试探买入，但应设置严格止损，同时在2240-2255美元附近减仓或做空操作，控制仓位风险，等待趋势确认后再布局中线多头。整体操作应以顺势为主，避免逆势追涨。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is trading near 2227, showing limited momentum after a narrow intraday range between 2221 and 2229. Price action remains subdued, suggesting the market is consolidating after recent weakness rather than initiating a strong recovery. The fact that ETH/USD continues trading below the 20-day simple moving average around 2259 reinforces a cautious short-term outlook. Sellers still appear to control the broader trend, although downside pressure has eased over the last 24 hours.

The moving average structure indicates that bullish momentum has not yet fully returned. Trading beneath the SMA(20) often reflects reduced confidence among short-term buyers, especially when rallies struggle to sustain above resistance zones. Meanwhile, the MACD value at -13.95 points to lingering bearish momentum, even though the lack of strong daily losses suggests selling intensity may be fading. RSI data is unavailable, but current price behavior implies neutral-to-weak market sentiment rather than oversold conditions.

Immediate support is developing around 2220, which has repeatedly contained intraday declines. A decisive break below this level could expose ETH to further downside toward the psychologically important 2200 region, followed by 2175. On the upside, resistance remains near 2259, aligning with the SMA(20). If buyers reclaim this zone with stronger volume, Ethereum could attempt a recovery toward 2280 and potentially 2300, where broader selling pressure may re-emerge.

Short-term traders may prefer a cautious range-trading approach until clearer directional confirmation appears. Buying near support with tight risk controls could remain viable while 2220 holds, but aggressive long positions may be premature before ETH regains the 2259 resistance area. Momentum traders should monitor for a breakout accompanied by rising volume and improving MACD structure. Conversely, a failure to hold current support would likely favor short-term bearish continuation strategies targeting lower support zones.
